_comment: Trial tags configuration. 20 tags across 7 dimensions. Tags marked with a band probe are designed to test correlation between subjective reports and EEG brainwave readings.
question: What did this pattern feel like?

tags.label: Unsettling
tags.description: Felt uncomfortable or disturbing [Valence | High Beta]

tags.label: Tense
tags.description: Created a feeling of tension or stress [Arousal | High Beta]

tags.label: Chaotic
tags.description: Felt disorganized or scattered [Arousal | High Beta]

tags.label: Rhythmic
tags.description: Had a strong beat or pulse [Temporal]

tags.label: Focused
tags.description: Helped concentration or attention [Cognitive | Low Beta / Gamma]

tags.label: Drowsy
tags.description: Felt sleepy or drifting off [Cognitive | Delta]

tags.label: Hypnotic
tags.description: Felt mesmerizing or trance-like [Cognitive | Theta / Delta]

tags.label: Grounding
tags.description: Felt centering or stabilizing [Spatial | Alpha / Delta]
